event: Dystopian urban scene with floating advertisement ring
description: A dark, atmospheric science-fiction scene depicting two figures standing on a snowy street between apartment buildings at night. A large floating circular ring covered with illuminated corporate advertisements and neon signs hovers above the cityscape in the middle distance. The buildings have lit windows creating a warm contrast against the cold, snowy environment. The sky has a brownish, polluted haze. The overall mood is bleak and dystopian, with muted colors punctuated by the bright neon glow of the floating advertisements.
